home.heroSubhead: Discover an exceptional, exquisite experience of traditional Indian cuisine prepared by masters of culinary arts.
home.whySubtitle: Authentic flavors, heartfelt hospitality, and ingredients chosen with care.
home.whyRecipesDesc: Dishes prepared according to authentic recipes straight from the heart of India.
home.whyIngredientsDesc: We use only carefully selected, freshest herbs and vegetables.
home.whyHospitalityDesc: We make sure that every guest feels right at home with us.
home.whyVegetarianDesc: A wide selection of traditional meat-free dishes full of flavor.
home.dishesSub: Selected, most popular flavors recommended by our chefs
home.dishButterDesc: Tender chicken pieces in a creamy tomato-butter sauce with cashew nuts.
home.dishDalDesc: Black lentils slow-cooked with butter, cream, and aromatic spices.
home.dishBiryaniDesc: Aromatic basmati rice simmered with chicken, saffron, and fresh herbs.
home.dishNaanDesc: Traditional Indian bread from the tandoor oven, sprinkled with fresh garlic.
home.ambienceDesc: The stylish, cozy interior of Namaste combines modern elegance with warm Indian accents, creating the perfect place for a family dinner or a romantic date.
home.chefDesc: Our chefs care about the perfect balance of flavors. Each dish is prepared fresh using traditional techniques like baking in a clay tandoor oven.
home.servicesDineDesc: Enjoy your meal in our cozy and welcoming restaurant ambience.
home.servicesTakeawayDesc: Pick up your favorite dishes directly from the restaurant.
home.servicesDeliveryDesc: Warm, delicious meals delivered straight to your doorstep.
home.servicesReservationsDesc: Reserve your table online for special, memorable occasions.
home.finalCtaSub: We invite you to Namaste, where every visit becomes a memorable culinary journey.

story.title: Our Story
story.heroSub: Tradition, passion, and authentic flavors of India in Ciechanów.
story.philDesc: We believe that food is more than a meal – it is sharing joy. Our menu is based on natural ingredients and original Indian spices.
story.valuesDesc: Uncompromising quality, fresh preparation, and respect for traditional cooking techniques are the pillars of our kitchen.
story.reviewsPlaceholder: Guest reviews will be visible after the official opening.

menu.subtitle: Traditional recipes, fresh ingredients and authentic Indian hospitality.
menu.disclaimer: Prices and availability of dishes are subject to change. The menu is for informational purposes only.

reservations.trackingText: You can track your reservation status using the link below:
reservations.contactNote: For any questions, please contact us directly at 511 984 331.

statusDesc.pending: Your request is waiting for verification and confirmation by staff.
statusDesc.confirmed: Your reservation has been confirmed. We look forward to seeing you!
statusDesc.rejected: Unfortunately, the reservation could not be accepted for the selected time.
statusDesc.completed: Reservation completed. Thank you for visiting!

seo.homeTitle: Namaste Indian Restaurant | Authentic Indian Flavours in Ciechanów
seo.homeDesc: Discover Namaste, an exceptional Indian restaurant in Ciechanów. Enjoy authentic dishes prepared by native chefs in a clay tandoor oven.
seo.storyDesc: Learn about the tradition, passion, and culinary craft behind Namaste. Our kitchen is built on authentic Indian recipes.
seo.menuTitle: Our Menu | Namaste Indian Restaurant Ciechanów
seo.menuDesc: Explore the authentic Indian menu at Namaste in Ciechanów. We offer delicious Butter Chicken, Tikka Masala, vegetarian, vegan dishes and Naan bread from tandoor oven.
seo.reservationsTitle: Table Reservation Preview | Namaste Indian Restaurant
seo.reservationsDesc: Book your table online at Namaste. Interactive forms and table selector will launch in Phase 6.
seo.contactDesc: Get in touch with Namaste in Ciechanów. Find address details, phone numbers, and our contact form.
seo.privacyDesc: Privacy policy of Namaste Indian Restaurant. Read about how we process and protect your personal data (GDPR).
seo.cookieDesc: Cookie policy of Namaste. Learn how we use cookies to improve your browsing experience on our website.
seo.termsTitle: Terms of Service | Namaste Indian Restaurant
seo.termsDesc: Terms and conditions for using the website and reserving tables at Namaste Indian Restaurant.
